creator: joh.hendriks@gmail.com
text:
If i enable max protocol = smb2

The following messages starts to appear in the log files.

smb2_sendfile_send_data: sendfile failed for file 
Desktop/Downloads-mozilla/FreeBSD-9.0-BETA1-amd64-memstick.img (Socket 
is not connected). Terminating

This happens when i want to copy a file from the samba server 
(8.2-STABLE) to the windows 7 client.
Also browsing folders with large files give's me hangs on the client 
side and same logs (different filenames).
It looks like it only happens with larger files.

By disabeling max protocol, the server works like before, no problem.


Gr
Johan Hendriks
